channel.title: Abuse on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Abuse on Compossible

item.title: We Must Resist
item.description:
Read by the author

They’ll try

To cut

The threads

That bind us

To freeze

The love that flows

Between us

So they can

Segregate or

Imprison us

They’ll try

To quell

Our ‘slave’ rebellion

They aim

To kill

Simple compassion

To make

Each heart

Cold tomb

And catacomb

Made ready
